calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Appearances:
Triet M. Nguen, claimant/judgment debtor, appearing on his own behalf, with wife Sophia Nguyen acting as his translator;
No other appearance.

Hearing held. After hearing, the Court ruled on PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), NA'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Triet M. Nguyen - Granted in part.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

After hearing, copies of the order were mailed to the parties and a certified true copy was mailed to the San Francisco County Sheriff's Office.
